title: Haru's Random Invention
description: This mod adds lots of things such as biomes and useful items, there isn't a specific theme like the name says, its random
body:
This is my first mod, leave comment about suggestion !

 

This mod adds :  
- 1 new biome and wood types  
- tools such as hammers  
- Utility things like super coal or super compost  

 

The official release also adds new things, check the changelog !

 

 

 

This mod is for make a survival adventure more enjoyable with random things that upgrades the quality of life. Its pretty much randomù things that goes trought my mind.

 

 

 If you have any advice for Mcreator and the mod, comment it !

 

Curious may be required
 

Thanks for downloading the mod ! :D

 

This mod is forge only !

 

 

Looking for people willing to contribute to create the mod :)
